name: s2-swarm-sync-protocol
description: S2-SWM Zero-Trust Swarm Synchronization Engine. Authenticates peer signatures before executing Federated Perception or Right-of-Way Arbitration, preventing physical spoofing attacks in MAS environments.

S2_SWARM_PKI_ROOT.description: The cryptographic public key or PKI root used to authenticate peer signatures in the P2P Mesh.

author: Space2.world (Miles Xiang)
